product: Lakebase Autoscaling now includes high availability
tagline: Lakebase Autoscaling now includes high availability.
what_it_does: Lakebase Autoscaling now includes high availability. High availability provides automatic failover from your primary compute instance to secondary compute instances distributed across availability zones, with no connection string changes required. High availability pairs a primary read/write compute with one or more secondary compute instances distributed across availability zones.
why_it_matters: AZ distribution Lakebase distributes the primary and secondary compute instances across availability zones, reducing the risk that a single AZ failure affects both the primary and all secondary compute instances.
key_takeaway: Lakebase Autoscaling now includes high availability.
